report: ed2kIA v1.3.0 STABLE — Final Validation Report

LP-91.name: Release Packaging & CI/CD
LP-91.validation: POSIX release script + GitHub Actions workflow with matrix builds, audit, and release jobs

LP-92.name: Docs de Lanzamiento & Migración
LP-92.validation: Launch announcement, migration guide (7 breaking changes documented), architecture doc (5 modules)

LP-93.name: Transparencia & Financiamiento Comunitario
LP-93.validation: Transparency report (code, financial, security, governance) + funding guide (Gitcoin, donations, sustainability)

LP-94.name: Roadmap v1.4.0 & Sprint 1 Spec
LP-94.validation: Roadmap (P0-P2 priorities, 3 sprints, timeline) + Sprint 1 spec (LP-98→LP-101, API design, acceptance criteria)

zero_financial_logic.evidence: No token economics, staking rewards, or payment processing in codebase

zero_telemetry.evidence: No external data collection, analytics, or phone home mechanisms

apache_2_ethical_use.evidence: LICENSE file present, ethical use addendum documented

zero_unsafe.evidence: All v1.3 modules use safe Rust only
